creator: viktor.stujber+freebsd-bugs_v4CCPfay@gmail.com
text: On 10.2-RELEASE, my long-term load average is around 0.10, which may be closer to reality because of powerd (225-1800MHz frequency scaling range). The currently chosen timecounter is TSC and the eventtimer is HPET. Unfortunately I forgot to note down the previous values. I can try an older kernel if needed.
